name: Journalism & OSINT: single-claim verification
task: One document states a fact. Ingest it as evidence, propose one claim that reflects the fact, link one evidence span as support, and export the investigation as .chronicle. No tension (single-source verification).

documents.content: Press release dated 2024-02-01: The company announced the merger with Acme Corp. Closing is expected in Q2 2024.
